goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'hobsons house'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type', 'area', and 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 18:00'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should go to 'leicester'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.
